element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic combat against initial enemy forces
Short duration flight with thermal management; overheating forces landing and cooldown
Power bar management - weapons drain energy; recharge only in bright light sources
Independent movement and firing; separate shield system; Ranger X can enter for protection
Introduced via wireframe 3D cutscene; must destroy all objectives before boss encounter
Final challenge after objective completion; requires mastery of accumulated mechanics

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching bright light source to recharge weapons
Landing jet pack to cool down thermal system
Entering Ex-Up vehicle for shield protection
typical_tension_triggers: Managing dual action systems (flight and combat)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating complexity through dual-action mechanics (jet pack thermal management + weapon power management) creates rhythmic tension cycles; wireframe cutscenes provide narrative breaks between levels

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Power-up scattered across levels indicating optional weapon acquisition paths

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of core mechanics: standard pulse rifle, jet pack flight with thermal limits, basic enemy encounters
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of special weapons requiring power management and Ex-Up vehicle control; tactical opportunities expand with dual-action systems
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stage bosses requiring mastery of accumulated mechanics and resource management
notable_spikes: First special weapon introduction requiring bright light source management
Ex-Up vehicle segments requiring independent movement coordination
Stage bosses requiring synthesis of all available mechanics

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level introduces via wireframe 3D cutscene with specific target objective. Player battles through enemies, destroys all objectives, then faces stage boss to progress. Creates clear goal hierarchy and narrative context.

Jet pack requires cooldown after overheating; special weapons require power bar recharge in bright light. Creates natural pacing beats where player must land/seek illumination, providing relief from constant action.
Certain levels feature controllable Ex-Up motorcycle (Indra) with independent firing. Ranger X can enter vehicle for separate shielding. Expands tactical opportunities and adds mechanical variety.
